_source: Research brief 2 §Taxonomy of Force Vectors — the coordinate system the biomechanics engine reasons in.

force_vectors.label: Axial · superoinferior
force_vectors.description: Force along the long axis of the body, top→bottom.

force_vectors.label: Axial · inferosuperior
force_vectors.description: Force along the long axis, bottom→top.

force_vectors.label: Anteroposterior
force_vectors.description: Force from front→back of the body.
force_vectors.example: Hip thrust, glute bridge, inverted row

force_vectors.label: Posteroanterior
force_vectors.description: Force from back→front; user pulls rearward.

force_vectors.label: Lateromedial
force_vectors.description: Force from outside→midline or vice versa.

force_vectors.label: Torsional
force_vectors.description: Rotational force around the longitudinal axis.
force_vectors.example: Cable woodchop, Russian twist, Pallof press
